Problem: GCP Antenna Height Blunder (Pole-Mounted)
Coverage Note: gcp_antenna_height_documented_score (L3I_GCP_005) + hard gate. Antenna type match (L3I_GCP_007) backs it up.

Problem: Device Battery / Solar Failure Mid-Session
Coverage Note: occupation_coverage_score (L3I_GCP_001) + occupation_integrity_score (L3I_GCP_002) per-point catch mid-session failure.

Problem: GCP Device Deployed in Multipath Environment
Coverage Note: gcp_multipath_score (L3I_GCP_008) per point.

Problem: Device_ID Mismatch — RINEX Orphaned
Coverage Note: gcp_device_id_match_score (L3I_GCP_006). Reviewer-blocking — RINEX orphans detected.

Problem: RINEX Recording Starts After Drone Takeoff
Coverage Note: gcp_acquisition_score (L3I_GCP_009). Compares RINEX start to drone takeoff timing.

Problem: X/AeroPoint Moved During Flight
Coverage Note: GCP_POINT_DISTURBANCE composite (flag-only) — no dedicated scoring indicator. README notes: BLIND to slow settling that produces no gap/slip signal.

Problem: Traditional Mark Disturbed Before Drone Flight
Coverage Note: SPLIT coverage: CB_X / AeroPoint case detectable via per-point continuity (L3I_GCP_004) + disturbance composite. Traditional physical marks → Stage 2 ODM only.

Problem: X/AeroPoint on Uneven Surface
Coverage Note: Hardware limitation: GCP devices have no inclinometer. No field, no indicator, no flag possible at any stage. Mitigation is procedural.

Problem: Physical Target Washed Away / Blown Over
Coverage Note: Stage 2 ODM target-detection only. No Stage-1 GCP-side signal exists when a physical target disappears between deployment and overflight.

Problem: No Check Points — All Targets Used as GCPs
Coverage Note: Future check_point_score (not yet built). Survey-design flag also planned in pre_processing_score.

Problem: Too Many Check Points — Insufficient GCP Control
Coverage Note: Future check_point_score (role-allocation logic). Same future component as #1.

Problem: Check Points Not Spatially Independent
Coverage Note: pre_processing_score owns spatial-independence check.

Problem: Insufficient GCP Count for Site Extent
Coverage Note: pre_processing_score owns count gate (requires site area input).

Problem: GCPs Clustered Near Access Roads
Coverage Note: pre_processing_score owns spatial distribution check (requires reconstruction extent).

Problem: GCPs Not Covering Terrain Extremes (Vertical)
Coverage Note: Learning Engine owns vertical-extremes coverage (requires DTM).

Problem: GCP Coordinate Accuracy Unknown / Handheld GPS
Coverage Note: pre_processing_score Stage 2 owns coordinate-accuracy verification.

Problem: Target Not Visible from Flight Altitude
Coverage Note: pre_processing_score owns target-visibility check (cross-doc with drone planned_gsd_cm).

Problem: Pre-Surveyed Coordinates in Wrong CRS / Datum
Coverage Note: pre_processing_score owns CRS/datum verification.

Problem: GCP Coordinate Processing Method Too Weak
Coverage Note: pre_processing_score Stage 2 owns processing-method assessment.

Problem: GCP Count Adequate but Reconstruction Still Drifts
Coverage Note: Learning Engine owns drift detection (downstream consequence of #5).

Problem: Wrong Coordinate Entered in ODM (Typo)
Coverage Note: Manual ODM coordinate entry. Outside CBMI scope.

Problem: Mixed GCP and Check Point Roles Reversed
Coverage Note: Third-party ODM software input. Outside CBMI scope.
